title: Turkuc SMP: PENTIMENTO
description: A dark survival RPG pack with 250+ mods, custom quests, and refined combat. Designed for small servers seeking challenge, atmosphere, and long-term progression.
body:
### IMPORTANT: THIS MODPACK AND ITS STORY AREN'T AVAILABLE RIGHT NOW. THE ONLY WAY TO EXPERIENCE IT IS TO PLAY ON THE TURKUĆ SMP SERVER. AFTER IT ENDS, THE WHOLE PACK WILL BE AVAILABLE TO ANYONE!
---
## The world didn’t end. It broke.
Miodkowo vanished. Konin fell into chaos, and when the Altar exploded, something old and unsettling returned to the world and its people. Now you walk through what’s left of a world that feels less like home and more like a failed experiment: unfinished, abandoned, or simply broken.

### Welcome to **Turkuc SMP: Pentimento** (Edition III).
This isn’t just another power-fantasy modpack.

This is a slow-paced, dark survival experience where the world feels unstable, incomplete, and heavy. You’ll explore abandoned structures, forgotten ruins, and places that seem like they were never meant to be discovered. There are no clear answers. Instead, you piece things together as you go, learning from what you see, what you fight, and what you carry.

This pack was created for the Turkuć SMP community, but it also works well for any small group looking for a grounded, atmospheric survival world with a bit of story.

![Modpack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b0e3ba08944d662089cafc2c7515f635483a10.png)

### What's inside?
* **Over 250 mods:** The world gets tougher, stranger, and more challenging, but it still keeps that classic vanilla feel.
* **Heavy Optimization:** Performance and stability are improved, so it runs smoothly on small servers with up to 20 players.
* **Custom Questline:** The journal-style questline guides you as you explore the world’s dark history.
* **Tuned Combat & Visuals:** Both are improved, with scaling difficulty and shaders that fit the game’s gritty atmosphere.

### Mods from outside Modrinth:
* [Armor & damage scaling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-damage-scaling-forge-fabric)
* [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
* [FTB Filter System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-filter-system)
* [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric)
* [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric)
* [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric)
* [FTB XMod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat)
